summary: Event-driven crypto platform: Technical Lead-level ownership of services, APIs, and cloud operations.
responsibilities: As a Senior Full-Stack Engineer operating with Technical Lead responsibility, I own end-to-end delivery on a secure crypto platform: service design, integration contracts, production operations, and mentoring engineers through code review and architecture decisions. I balance deep backend work with polished React/TypeScript experiences, keeping reliability and observability first as traffic and feature complexity grow.
keyContributions: Designed and shipped event-driven microservices (NestJS) with clear domain boundaries and resilient messaging patterns.
Led GraphQL API evolution and performance tuning for high-read workloads while coordinating with frontend teams on schema and caching strategy.
Drove AWS operational excellence: CI/CD hardening, infrastructure-as-code patterns, and incident-ready observability.
Acted as Technical Lead on critical initiatives—aligning stakeholders, sequencing delivery, and unblocking teams without compromising security.

summary: Principal Developer and Technical Lead for enterprise IAM: OIDC, SCIM, and 40M+ user migrations.
highlights: OIDC / SCIM / Spring Batch at scale
responsibilities: As Principal Developer with Technical Lead accountability, I led architecture and delivery for enterprise identity programs: OIDC/SAML integrations, SCIM lifecycle automation, and large-scale user migrations. I partnered with customer architects, mentored distributed teams, and translated complex IdP requirements into secure, maintainable Java/Spring services and batch pipelines.
keyContributions: Owned Technical Lead delivery for IAM programs integrating with Auth0-class ecosystems and major enterprise IdPs (Okta, Azure AD patterns).
Executed a 40M+ user migration initiative using Spring Batch with rigorous validation, rollback strategy, and operational runbooks.
Delivered SCIM provisioning and OIDC authorization flows meeting enterprise security and compliance expectations.
Optimized API and batch performance on Node.js/NestJS and Java/Spring Boot paths, improving throughput and operational cost.
Mentored engineers on clean layering, testing discipline, and production readiness for regulated customers.

summary: Consulting delivery for fintech and digital banking clients: IAM, APIs, and Technical Lead guidance on engagements.
responsibilities: At DacompSC I led full-stack delivery for enterprise clients in fintech and digital banking, operating as Technical Lead on engagements spanning identity modernization, API platforms, and secure customer channels. I translated business and compliance needs into executable roadmaps, coordinated cross-functional teams, and kept architecture aligned with Clean Architecture and long-term maintainability.
keyContributions: Served as Technical Lead on multi-phase projects: discovery, design reviews, sprint planning, and hands-on implementation across Java and React/TypeScript stacks.
Delivered OAuth 2.0 / OIDC and SSO programs for regulated environments, including MFA rollout patterns and session hardening.
Built and integrated REST APIs and admin tooling for banking workflows, emphasizing auditability and operational clarity.
Mentored client developers and optimized delivery workflows using modern tooling and AI-assisted development where appropriate.
